name: Wollow, Founder of the Drudge Dragons
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>祖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>隷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウォロー
name_jp_tl: Wollow, Drudge Dragon of the Death Founder
desc:
2+ Level 6 monsters
Monsters you control gain 100 ATK/DEF for each card in your opponent's GY. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY and detach 1 or 2 materials from this card, then activate the appropriate effect;
● 1: Return it to the Deck.
● 2: If the target is a monster, Special Summon it face-up, or in face-down Defense Position, to your field. If it is not, Set it on your field.
You can only use this effect of "Wollow, Founder of the Drudge Dragons" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
Sets from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
